Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq., 433-4800, for defendant Beverly Saba, moving for summary judgment
Olivia M. Paniagua, Esq., 285-4785, for plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court denied DEFENDANT BEVERLY SABA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: Judgment as a matter of law and Moving party's proof for 3-day notice. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2002 Continued To Dec-20-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bradshaw A. Drexel, Esq., 433-4800, for defendnat Beverly Saba moving for summary judgment
Olivia M. Paniagua, Esq., 285-4785, for plaintiff and opposing party
Upon request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court continued DEFENDANT BEVERLY SABA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT to December 20, 2002 to allow plaintiff to file the opposition paper, notice waived. Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne CSR # 7855

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Continued To Jan-06-03 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilia. Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. appeared for Defendant, Beverly Saba. Counsel stated to the Court that the parties have stipulated to a continuance and the Court continued the matter to January 6, 2003.
